agency_contact.parent_department: Madera County Community and Economic Development Department

dept_structure.department_name_significance: The 'Community and Economic Development' framing is atypical for a CA county EH parent department -- signals explicit pro-business agency posture. Most CA counties house EH under Public Health (Imperial, Kings), Community Development (Del Norte, Glenn), Planning & Building Services (Lassen), or DHHS (Humboldt). Madera is the first county documented this session with an explicit 'Economic Development' element in the EH parent department name.

dept_structure.structural_pattern_significance: San Benito uses a triple-layered hierarchy: Environmental Health within Public and Environmental Services within Health and Human Services Agency. Even more nested than Mariposa's double-layered pattern (EH within Health Services Division within HHS) or Humboldt's single-layer pattern (DEH within DHHS direct). Reflects mid-tier organizational layering at small-county scale with EH grouped with Public Health under a 'Public and Environmental Services' umbrella.
